calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:PLAINTIFF NASIR PATEL IN PRO PER
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY RITA GILMORE FOR DEFENDANT KEVIN WALSH

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR.TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT TO VACATE PREMISES AT 2048 POLK STREET, # 210 ON OR BEFORE 10/18/06, 5PM.
PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE NEUTRAL REFERENCE.
DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $175. ON 9/17/06; $350. ON 10/2/06; AND $350. ON 10/16/06.
PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL PAST-DUE RENT. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO FOLLOW TERMS, PLAINTIFF MAY, ON 24 HOUR NOTICE, SUBMIT AN EXPARTE APPLICATION TO THE COURT FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION AND ANY MONIES UNPAID.
PARTIES RELEASE EACH OTHER FROM ALL CLAIMS.
PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT AGREE TO TERMS. SO ORDERED.

JUDGE PRO TEM:ANDREW WESTLEY ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: RITA HOWELL(218)
